scripts.build: npm run check:rest && node scripts/run-vite-rest.mjs build
scripts.build:rest: npm run check:rest && node scripts/run-vite-rest.mjs build
scripts.test:unit: npm run check:rest && vitest run --run src/adapters/rest/request.test.ts src/context/AuthContext.test.tsx
scripts.test:component: npm run check:rest && vitest run --run src/App.test.tsx src/components/AdminPanel.test.tsx src/components/BrandMark.test.tsx src/components/Dashboard.test.tsx src/components/ErrorBoundary.test.tsx src/components/Login.test.tsx src/components/PermitCard.test.tsx src/components/ProtectedRoute.test.tsx
scripts.test:integration: npm run check:rest && npm --prefix examples/rest-backend run integration-test && vitest run --run src/App.test.tsx src/components/Login.test.tsx src/components/Dashboard.test.tsx src/components/AdminPanel.test.tsx
scripts.test:accessibility: npm run check:rest && vitest run --run src/components/Accessibility.test.tsx
scripts.test:regression: npm run check:rest && vitest run --run src/adapters/rest/request.test.ts src/components/Dashboard.test.tsx src/components/AdminPanel.test.tsx
scripts.test:system: npm run test:api && npm run test:integration && npm run test:e2e
scripts.test:all: npm run test:unit && npm run test:component && npm run test:accessibility && npm run test:snapshot && npm run test:regression && npm run test:security && npm run test:performance && npm run test:system
